map.message: $(string.map_MFNDDirtyPageTrackingGranularityMapMFND dirty page tracking granularity size is 4K)
$(string.map_MFNDDirtyPageTrackingGranularityMapMFND dirty page tracking granularity size is 8K)
$(string.map_MFNDDirtyPageTrackingGranularityMapMFND dirty page tracking granularity size is 16K)
$(string.map_MFNDDirtyPageTrackingGranularityMapMFND dirty page tracking granularity size is 32K)
$(string.map_MFNDDirtyPageTrackingGranularityMapMFND dirty page tracking granularity size is 64K)
$(string.map_ReasonMapUnit experienced Timeout conditions with more than allowed frequency)
$(string.map_MFNDSetOperationSelectMapMFND invalid select value for set operation)

event.keywords: Read Write PagingRead PagingWrite LowMemoryRead LowMemoryWrite
Read Write PagingRead PagingWrite LowMemoryRead LowMemoryWrite
